articles.title: Johor state polls: Can smaller reformist parties like Bersama and MUDA break into PH’s urban seats?
articles.content: The rising costs of living, increasingly frequent floods and housing affordability are among the concerns she hears most from voters. “They want to see more alternative political establishments that can represent their voices,” she told CNA. “I want to be the best representative for them.”

articles.title: Justin Baldoni Reflects on ‘Painful’ Blake Lively Legal Fight After Nearly 2 Years of Silence
articles.content: Justin Baldoni reflected on his "painful" legal dispute with Blake Lively on Wednesday, saying "gratitude" helped him through the public controversy. "It's not because we haven't had anything to say," he said

articles.title: Graham Platner Waiting Until Last Minute To Formally Withdraw From Senate Race: Reports
articles.content: Democrat Graham Platner is waiting until the last minute to formally withdraw from the U.S. Senate race in Maine, sources told Axios and Bloomberg on Thursday. A campaign strategist for Platner confirmed he plans to file his resignation papers on Monday
